summary: Backend-only testing for Sleda (Следа) API. Created pytest suite covering all 9 requested scenarios across root, trip CRUD, markers and validation. All 14 tests passed against the public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (https://trace-fisher.preview.emergentagent.com).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is well-structured: uses /api prefix, UUID ids, excludes _id via projections, async motor calls, Literal-based marker type validation -> 422 on invalid.
PATCH /trips filters None values via exclude_unset+None-check; acceptable but means clients cannot explicitly null-out a field (e.g., reset ended_at to null). Minor — not in scope of this iteration.
Consider using @app.on_event lifespan handlers (deprecated in newer FastAPI), but functional.
CORS allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True is technically a spec violation; browsers will ignore credentials. Acceptable for current public preview.
seed_data_creation: Test trips are created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up via DELETE in teardown test (test_zz_cleanup) and TestTripDelete.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints all healthy. Test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_trips.py uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL env var. Frontend (Expo web) was NOT tested per request. Note: expo.err.log shows ngrok tunnel intermittent restarts but web bundling succeeds.
test_credentials: No auth flows in this iteration; /app/memory/test_credentials.md not required.

tests_executed.TestTripCRUD::test_create_trip_defaults: PASS - UUID id, ISO started_at, empty route/markers, distance_m=0, duration_s=0, no _id
tests_executed.TestTripCRUD::test_list_trips_sorted_des: PASS - sorted started_at desc, no _id in any doc
tests_executed.TestTripUpdate::test_patch_all_fields_pe: PASS - name/ended_at/route/markers/distance_m/duration_s updated and persisted (verified via GET)
